creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 163436
update www/py-django-allauth to 0.24.1

This patch updates www/py-django-allauth to version 0.24.1 (the latest), which is needed to update textproc/pootle to version 2.7.2 (that version requires at least version 0.22.0 of py-django-allauth)

Build-tested on FreeBSD 9i386, 9amd64, 10i386, 10amd64, 11amd64

Also set the NO_ARCH flag since this port does not install any architecture-dependent files.
